headline: Earnings Growth Prospects Affirm The Southern Company (SO) As a Top Utility Stock
summary: The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is one of the top utility stocks to buy now. On April 9, Barclays reiterated an Equal weight on The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) and raised the price target to $99 from $88. The price target hike aligns with the investment bank’s earnings growth expectations. Barclays expects the company to reaffirm its […]

headline: Southern Company: Hold Regardless Of Upcoming Earnings, Still A Core Utility Position
summary: The Southern Company is a core multi-utility holding, but current valuation and macro uncertainty warrant a Hold rating. Read more on SO stock here.

headline: PowerSecure to deliver advanced energy storage and solar for PRECorp, strengthening rural grid resiliency
summary: PowerSecure, a subsidiary of Southern Company and a leading provider of resilient, innovative energy solutions, is collaborating with Powder River Energy Corporation (PRECorp) and the NRTC to advance a utility‑scale battery energy storage and solar generation project in Moorcroft, Wyo.
